name: Right person, outsourcing today
prompt: Yes, I handle that. We're outsourcing some of the short-run label work right now.

name: Wrong person with contact help
prompt: No, I don't handle that. The best person is our operations manager, and her email is ops@example.com.

name: Direct machine spec question
prompt: Potentially. Do you know what size web width the machines have?

name: Material capability question
prompt: Can your machines print on Mylar or BOPP?

name: Already have a printer
prompt: We already have a digital printer in-house.

name: Send me information
prompt: Can you just send me some information?

name: Direct price question
prompt: What do your printers usually cost?

name: Not the right person, no help
prompt: No, that's not me. I don't have a number or email for that person.
